description:
GIVEN the user has the SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlement
OR the user is a free user
AND the user is logged in

steps.action:
WHEN a user with SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlement views a focused VOD/SVOD/FLIVE/SLIVE basic tile
OR a free user views a focused VOD/FLIVE basic tile
steps.result:
THEN the featured tiles are 2 basic forge tiles wide
AND the featured tiles are 2 basic forge tiles high
AND the tile has a white border to indicate focus
AND the title portion of the tile has a white background to indicate focus
AND the associated thumbnail displays in the top 3/4 of the tile
AND the video duration is displayed in the bottom right corner of the associated thumbnail
AND the title displays left justified below the associated thumbnail
AND the video published date displays left justified below the title
AND a lock icon is not displayed in the upper right corner of the tile
